channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in All Languages (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in All Languages nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🦀 ultraworkers/claw-code (189090 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ultraworkers

📝 Repository: ultraworkers/claw-code

📄 Descrizione: The repo is finally unlocked. enjoy the party! The fastest repo in history to surpass 100K stars ⭐. Join Discord: https://discord.gg/5TUQKqFWd Built in Rust using oh-my-codex.

⭐ Stelle: 189090

🍴 Forks: 109456

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-31T08:58:08Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-29T05:13:12Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🐍 safishamsi/graphify (39969 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: safishamsi

📝 Repository: safishamsi/graphify

📄 Descrizione: AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph.

⭐ Stelle: 39969

🍴 Forks: 4409

💻 Linguaggio: Python

🏷️ Topics: antigravity claude-code codex gemini graphrag knowledge-graph leiden openclaw rag skills tree-sitter

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-02T04:51:59Z

item.title: 🟦 nexu-io/open-design (37689 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: nexu-io

📝 Repository: nexu-io/open-design

📄 Descrizione: 🎨 Local-first, open-source alternative to Anthropic's Claude Design. ⚡ 19 Skills · ✨ 71 brand-grade Design Systems 🖼 Generate web · desktop · mobile prototypes · slides · images · videos · HyperFrames 📦 Sandboxed preview · HTML/PDF/PPTX/MP4 export 🤖 Runs on Claude Code / Codex / Cursor / Gemini / OpenCode / Qwen / Copilot / Hermes / Kimi CLI.

🍴 Forks: 4283

item.title: 🟦 nashsu/llm_wiki (6138 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: nashsu

📝 Repository: nashsu/llm_wiki

📄 Descrizione: LLM Wiki is a cross-platform desktop application that turns your documents into an organized, interlinked knowledge base — automatically. Instead of traditional RAG (retrieve-and-answer from scratch every time), the LLM incrementally builds and maintains a persistent wiki from your sources。

⭐ Stelle: 6138

🍴 Forks: 752

item.title: 🐍 OpenMOSS/MOSS-TTS-Nano (2821 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: OpenMOSS

📝 Repository: OpenMOSS/MOSS-TTS-Nano

📄 Descrizione: MOSS-TTS-Nano is an open-source multilingual tiny speech generation model from MOSI.AI and the OpenMOSS team. With only 0.1B parameters, it is designed for realtime speech generation, can run directly on CPU without a GPU, and keeps the deployment stack simple enough for local demos, web serving, and lightweight product integration.

⭐ Stelle: 2821

🍴 Forks: 365

💻 Linguaggio: Python
